blended.narrative: Breckenridge is looking at light snowfall over the next 48 hours, with 2.5 inches of moderate-density snow expected. Snow levels around 8,432 ft.

daily_summary.narrative: Tomorrow: 2.4" of snow, highs of 41°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.

recent_conditions.narrative: 1.6" of new snow in the past 48 hours. Base has been melting — down 6" over the past week. Current depth: 28".
